content: If we conceptualize an LLM agent as a spreading activation network where every agent action is an activated concept node, successful goal completion relies on iteratively propagating activation through associative action chains rather than pre-planning a full trajectory. Each activated action node primes adjacent possible next steps based on past associative experience, turning rigid agent planning into a dynamic, association-driven search process.
source_topics: **Spreading Activation for large language model associative recall
trigger_topic: **Spreading Activation for large language model associative recall
